title: Ba`al #1168
definition:
Baal = "lord"

 n pr m
 1) supreme male divinity of the Phoenicians or Canaanites
 2) a Reubenite
 3) the son of Jehiel and grandfather of Saul

 n pr loc
 4) a town of Simeon, probably identical to Baalath-beer
nasbUsage:
